title: waltheria astropus
intro: Waltheria astropus, also known as Waltheria indica, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which have been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Waltheria astropus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive problems, among others. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic properties.
